case_title: FOWLER, WILLIAM et al VS OSTROVSKY, LEO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOWLER, WILLIAM FOWLER, MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSTROVSKY, LEO BRAUDE, MICHAEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,062.00, DEFENDANT LEO OSTROVSKY'S MOTION TO DISMISS AS IMPROPER PARTY DDENIED; CASE DISMISS AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL BRAUDE, WHO IS UNSERVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
